# IUT dispute timeline

- **1985-01-01** — abc conjecture proposed (Masser, Oesterle) (actors: Masser, Oesterle)
- **2008-01-01** — Frobenioids I and II published (Mochizuki) (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2009-01-01** — The etale theta function paper published (Mochizuki) (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2012-08-30** — IUTch I-IV released as RIMS preprints (2012-08-30) (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2017-12-17** — Calegari blog 'the abc conjecture has still not been proved' (actors: Calegari)
- **2018-03-15** — Scholze and Stix visit RIMS for IUT discussions (March 2018, exact day approximate) (actors: Scholze, Stix, Mochizuki, Hoshi, Yamashita)
- **2018-05-01** — Mochizuki additional comment Cmt2018-05 (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2018-07-16** — Scholze-Stix 'Why abc is still a conjecture' report (actors: Scholze, Stix)
- **2018-09-01** — Mochizuki 'Report on Discussions' counter-response (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2018-09-20** — Quanta Magazine 'Titans of Mathematics Clash Over Epic Proof of ABC Conjecture' (actors: Hartnett, Scholze)
- **2019-04-26** — Kato Fumiharu 'Uchu to Uchu wo Tsunagu Sugaku: IUT Riron no Shogeki' published (KADOKAWA) (actors: Kato Fumiharu)
- **2020-04-03** — PRIMS announces acceptance of IUT four papers (April 2020) (actors: PRIMS editorial board)
- **2021-03-05** — IUT four papers published in PRIMS Vol.57 (actors: PRIMS editorial board)
- **2024-06-25** — Yamashita survey 'A proof of abc conjecture after Mochizuki' updated (actors: Yamashita)
- **2025-04-29** — Joshi 'Final Report on Mochizuki-Scholze-Stix Controversy' v1 (arXiv:2505.10568v1) (actors: Joshi)
- **2025-10-28** — Mochizuki IUT progress report (RIMS preprint IUT-report-2025-10.pdf) (actors: Mochizuki)
- **2026-03-31** — LANA (Lean for ANabelian geometry) project announced by ZMC (actors: Commelin, Kedlaya, Hoshi, Topaz, Kato Fumiharu, ZMC)
- **2026-04-07** — Mochizuki et al. 'On the Formalization of IUT' preliminary progress report (actors: Mochizuki, Hoshi, Yamashita, Yang)
- **2026-05-02** — Joshi arXiv:2505.10568 v2 update (actors: Joshi)
- **2026-07-17** — LANA mid-report scheduled (PENDING) (actors: Commelin, Kedlaya, Hoshi, Topaz, Kato Fumiharu)
